name: Stryve Foods Inc. Warrant
summary: Stryve Foods Inc. Warrant is a warrant to purchase shares of Stryve Foods Inc., a healthy snacking company. The warrant gives the holder the right to buy shares of SNAX at a specified price and within a certain timeframe. Stryve's product portfolio consists primarily of air-dried meat snack products marketed under the Stryve, Kalahari, and Braaitime brand names.
